bridges.name: Cầu vượt đi bộ Văn Thánh

ledger.blurb: Riverside restaurant by the Văn Thánh canal.
Garden restaurant near the tourist village.
Neighborhood bánh mì on Điện Biên Phủ.
A coffee stop on this corner.
The convenience-store chain that anchors the hub.
Vegetarian quán in the inner lanes.
Phone-and-repair shop on the main strip.
The only coconut-broth duck phá lấu we found in the district.

ledger.blurb: The only fish-cake bánh canh we found in the district.
Specialty café off Nguyễn Gia Trí.
Crispy-skin chicken rice in the lanes.
A bank branch marking the commercial strip.
Corner café at the north edge.
Bánh mì stand at the north corner.
A local hotel near the junction.
